'''hofahaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:doctrinaire|doctrinaire]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-f-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:doctrinaire|doctrinaire]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| hofahaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hofahithi|hofahithi]] || [[word:hofahiji|hofahiji]] || [[word:hofahishi|hofahishi]] || [[word:hofahiki|hofahiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hofahuthuthu|hofahuthuthu]] || [[word:hofahujuju|hofahujuju]] || [[word:hofahushushu|hofahushushu]] || [[word:hofahukuku|hofahukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hofahuthu|hofahuthu]] || [[word:hofahuju|hofahuju]] || [[word:hofahushu|hofahushu]] || [[word:hofahuku|hofahuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hofahufthuf|hofahufthuf]] || [[word:hofahufjuf|hofahufjuf]] || [[word:hofahufshuf|hofahufshuf]] || [[word:hofahufkuf|hofahufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hofahethe|hofahethe]] || [[word:hofaheje|hofaheje]] || [[word:hofaheshe|hofaheshe]] || [[word:hofaheke|hofaheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hofahothotho|hofahothotho]] || [[word:hofahojojo|hofahojojo]] || [[word:hofahoshosho|hofahoshosho]] || [[word:hofahokoko|hofahokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hofahotho|hofahotho]] || [[word:hofahojo|hofahojo]] || [[word:hofahosho|hofahosho]] || [[word:hofahoko|hofahoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hofahofthof|hofahofthof]] || [[word:hofahofjof|hofahofjof]] || [[word:hofahofshof|hofahofshof]] || [[word:hofahofkof|hofahofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:hofahÃŸfthÃŸf|hofahÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:hofahÃŸfjÃŸf|hofahÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:hofahÃŸfshÃŸf|hofahÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:hofahÃŸfkÃŸf|hofahÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:hofahÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|hofahÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:hofahÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|hofahÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:hofahÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|hofahÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:hofahÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|hofahÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:hofahÃŸfthÃŸf|hofahÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:hofahÃŸfjÃŸf|hofahÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:hofahÃŸfshÃŸf|hofahÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:hofahÃŸfkÃŸf|hofahÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:hofahÃŸfthÃŸf|hofahÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:hofahÃŸfjÃŸf|hofahÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:hofahÃŸfshÃŸf|hofahÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:hofahÃŸfkÃŸf|hofahÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hofahÃḊthÃḊ|hofahÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:hofahÃḊjÃḊ|hofahÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:hofahÃḊshÃḊ|hofahÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:hofahÃḊkÃḊ|hofahÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hofahathatha|hofahathatha]] || [[word:hofahajaja|hofahajaja]] || [[word:hofahashasha|hofahashasha]] || [[word:hofahakaka|hofahakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hofahatha|hofahatha]] || [[word:hofahaja|hofahaja]] || [[word:hofahasha|hofahasha]] || [[word:hofahaka|hofahaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hofahafthaf|hofahafthaf]] || [[word:hofahafjaf|hofahafjaf]] || [[word:hofahafshaf|hofahafshaf]] || [[word:hofahafkaf|hofahafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:hofahasha|hofahasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:hofahshÃḋsha|hofahshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hofahrosha|hofahrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hofahmusha|hofahmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:hofahyasha|hofahyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohofahnkshÃḋsha|gohofahnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohofahnkrosha|gohofahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohofahnkmusha|gohofahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohofahnkyasha|gohofahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:hofafahasha|hofafahasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hofafahshÃḋsha|hofafahshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hofafahrosha|hofafahrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hofafahmusha|hofafahmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hofafahyasha|hofafahyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohofafahnkshÃḋsha|gohofafahnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohofafahnkrosha|gohofafahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohofafahnkmusha|gohofafahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohofafahnkyasha|gohofafahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:hefÃḊhasha|hefÃḊhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hefÃḊhshÃḋsha|hefÃḊhshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hefÃḊhrosha|hefÃḊhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hefÃḊhmusha|hefÃḊhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hefÃḊhyasha|hefÃḊhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohefÃḊhnkshÃḋsha|gohefÃḊhnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohefÃḊhnkrosha|gohefÃḊhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohefÃḊhnkmusha|gohefÃḊhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohefÃḊhnkyasha|gohefÃḊhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:hofahasha|hofahasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hofahshÃḋsha|hofahshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hofahrosha|hofahrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hofahmusha|hofahmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hofahyasha|hofahyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohofahnkshÃḋsha|gohofahnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohofahnkrosha|gohofahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohofahnkmusha|gohofahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohofahnkyasha|gohofahnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|2edd495}}
